title: System Schema
description: Schema for system-level configuration such as SMTP settings and production base URL

smtp.description: Unauthenticated SMTP server configuration for sending emails

base_url.description: Production base URL of the application, used in production email links and redirects. Local development uses generated VITE_BASE_URL in frontend/.env.development.

payments.description: Payment collection via the generated 'payment' edge function, a proxy to the payment provider. With dev_mode a built-in simulator replaces provider calls (no credentials needed).

provider.description: Payment provider the edge function proxies to

dev_mode.description: When true the edge function simulates the provider (test card 4000000000000002 is declined). When false it calls the provider API using the STRIPE_SECRET_KEY edge function secret.

concept.description: Concept holding the payable record (e.g. order)

amount_field.description: Field of the concept with the amount to charge, in currency units

currency.description: ISO currency code used for charges

status_field.description: Field of the concept where the payment status is recorded (unpaid/pending/paid/failed). Must be read-only for non-admin roles; the edge function writes it with the service role.

reference_field.description: Field of the concept where the provider payment reference (intent id) is recorded
